message:
test(core): add 17 tests for BOCPD and evidence ledger modules

- bocpd.rs: 9 new tests (with_prior custom params, ChangePoint debug/clone,
  ln_gamma non-positive, log_sum_exp edge cases, NigStats update/predictive,
  startup suppression, run-length distribution validity)
- evidence_ledger.rs: 8 new tests (entry defaults, serde roundtrip,
  parse_configured_path edge cases, empty ledger ops, hit_rate no outcomes,
  record_outcome nonexistent seq, entry equality, small ring buffer eviction)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
